title: Stable Lab @ UCSD
summary: This GitHub page describes the 'stable-lab' organization which hosts several repositories. The most relevant for software construction is the MAGE project, presented as a multi-agent engine for automated RTL (Register Transfer Level) code generation. Another significant project is Pro-V, an efficient multi-agent system for automatic RTL verification. No specific publication details, papers, or dates beyond repository updates are provided.
author: stable-lab
